2018 G.S.R. 495(E).—Whereas, sale and use of petcoke in lime kilns in the National Capital Region (NCR) States was notified vide notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change number G.S.R 45(E), dated the 19th January, 2018, wherein sale of petcoke are made only to the industrial units mentioned in the list annexed to the said notification as Annexure and any change in the said list shall be made on the recommendation of the concerned State Government and with the approval of the Central Pollution Control Board; And Whereas, the State Government of Rajasthan has recommended addition of 36 lime kilns in the Annexure mentioned above and the Central Pollution Control Board has approved the same. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-sections (1) and (2) of section 3 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the aforesaid notification, namely;- In the said notification, in the Annexure, after serial number 323 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial numbers and entries shall be inserted, namely:--. “324 M/s Shri Jeen Mata Chemicals & Lime Private Limited Village- Lalawas, Tehsil- Khinvsar, District- Nagaur 2 900 1890 180 325 M/s Vikas Lime Products Khasra No. 364/3, Hariyadhana, Tehsil-Bilara, District Jodhpur 2 1666 3499 333 -- 4 of 6 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(i)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 5 326 M/s Vikas Lime Industries Khasra No. 384/25/1, Hariyadhana, Tehsil-Bilara, District Jodhpur 1 600 1260 120 327 M/s Balaji Chemicals Khasra no. 575/53, Near Mirdha Krishi Farm, Ransi Gaon, Tehsil – Bilara , District Jodhpur 2 833 1749 167 328 M/s Special Lime Stone Pvt.
